TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Congo, the republic of the(ŚČõśěúŚÖĪŚíĆŚúč ) Kongko kapolongan kitakit , o itiraay i sasifo'an no Afrika a kitakit, Kongko-Polasa hananay mitahidang, nawhani iraay ko miriniay ko ngangan a kitakit o Kongko Finawlan kapolongan kitakit . O polong a sera nona kitakit ira ko 342 km¬≤. O tatapangan a niyaro' o syoto nona kitakit i, o Polasa Si, malafiyaway ato Kongko Finawlan kitaki, Komaylong, Sasifo'an Afrika a Kapolongan Kitakit, Kapong ato Ankola, mangatay ato Cinoya kitakit. Itini i 1 00 S, 15 00 E, noAfilika ko Congo, the republic of the. Polong no sekalay i 342,000 sq km "saka 64 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 341,500 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 500 sq km " Polong i 4,852,412 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 31.10%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 65.60%, malo no roma to a sera 3.30%. siyoto O (((Brazzaville)) ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakafalo 15 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Denis Sassou Nguesso , patirengan a romi'ad i 1997 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 25 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: ¶o~uŇčo~u, tńß…ô r…ôpo~u~ub~b~v…ĺi ¶ o~uf tńß…ô(***** ) ko~uŇčko~u kapo~u…ĺo~uŇčan kitakit , o~u itiraaj i sasifo~u °an no~u afrika a kitakit, ko~uŇčko~u-po~u…ĺasa ńßananaj mitańßi…¨~…ģaŇč, nawńßani iraaj ko~u miriniaj ko~u ŇčaŇčan a kitakit o~u ko~uŇčko~u finaw…ĺan kapo~u…ĺo~uŇčan kitakit . o~u po~u…ĺo~uŇč a s…ôra no~una kitakit ira ko~u *** km*. o~u tatapaŇčan a nijaro~u ° o~u sjo~uto~u no~una kitakit i, o~u po~u…ĺasa si, ma…ĺafijawaj ato~u ko~uŇčko~u finaw…ĺan kitaki, ko~umaj…ĺo~uŇč, sasifo~u °an afrika a kapo~u…ĺo~uŇčan kitakit, kapo~uŇč ato~u anko~u…ĺa, maŇčataj ato~u ¶ino~uja kitakit. itini i * ** s, ** ** …ô, no~uafi…ĺika ko~u ¶o~uŇčo~u, tńß…ô r…ôpo~u~ub~b~v…ĺi ¶ o~uf tńß…ô. po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u s…ôka…ĺaj i ***,*** s* km "saka ** ko~u rajraj no~u ŇčaŇčan. " "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, ***,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, *** s* km " po~u…ĺo~uŇč i *,***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańß…ôn a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇčan a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra *.**%. sijo~uto~u o~u (((b~b~vra**ab~vi…ĺ…ĺ…ô)) ko~u sijo~uto~u. kato~umir…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ pińßirat…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i sakafa…ĺo~u ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i …¨~…ģ…ônis sasso~uo~u~u Ňčo~u~u…ôsso~u , patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ¶ia ***
S.FORM: Congo, the republic of the(ŚČõśěúŚÖĪŚíĆŚúč ) Kongko kapolongan kitakit , o itiraay i sasifo'an no Afrika a kitakit, Kongko-Polasa hananay mitahidang, nawhani iraay ko miriniay ko ngangan a kitakit o Kongko Finawlan kapolongan kitakit . O polong a sera nona kitakit ira ko 342 km¬≤. O tatapangan a niyaro' o syoto nona kitakit i, o Polasa Si, malafiyaway ato Kongko Finawlan kitaki, Komaylong, Sasifo'an Afrika a Kapolongan Kitakit, Kapong ato Ankola, mangatay ato Cinoya kitakit. Itini i 1 00 S, 15 00 E, noAfilika ko Congo, the republic of the. Polong no sekalay i 342,000 sq km "saka 64 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 341,500 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 500 sq km " Polong i 4,852,412 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 31.10%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 65.60%, malo no roma to a sera 3.30%. siyoto O (((Brazzaville)) ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakafalo 15 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Denis Sassou Nguesso , patirengan a romi'ad i 1997 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 25 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
